title: Shared tool implementation oneOf (shell | http | builtin)
description:
Referenced by tool_manifest.v1.json. NOT referenced by hook_manifest.v1.json — hooks define their implementations inline so that the tool-only `timeout_ms` field cannot leak in (hooks have warn-only `time_budget_ms` per §15).

Three kinds:
- `shell`: spawn a subprocess.
- `http`: POST to a URL.
- `builtin`: implemented inside `atelier-core`. The harness routes by tool name to an internal handler; no transport configuration is needed. Used by the built-in tool manifests under `crates/atelier-core/tools/`.

oneOf.title: shell
oneOf.description: Spawn a subprocess. JSON-encoded payload arrives on stdin; impl writes JSON to stdout. Subject to §11 sandbox.

command.description: Executable path or name on PATH.

env.description: Environment overrides. Values support ${env:NAME} / ${keychain:NAME} interpolation per §11 credential storage.

oneOf.title: http
oneOf.description: POST JSON-encoded payload; receive JSON-encoded response. Counts as §12 egress; subject to local-only mode.

headers.description: HTTP headers. Values support ${env:NAME} / ${keychain:NAME} per §11. Authorization headers are redacted in the §12 audit log.

oneOf.title: builtin
oneOf.description: Implemented inside `atelier-core`. The harness routes by tool name to an internal handler. No transport, no subprocess. Used by the manifests under `crates/atelier-core/tools/` — see spec §15 L722 for the canonical built-in list.
